message:
ci: improve GitHub Actions workflows with caching, timeouts, and consolidation

- Add Bun dependency caching to all jobs using actions/cache@v4
  with bun.lock hash keys for faster CI runs
- Add job timeouts to prevent runaway workflows:
  - test/coverage: 15 min, e2e: 20 min, build: 10-20 min, notify: 5 min
- Add concurrency controls to prevent duplicate workflow runs:
  - CI: cancel-in-progress for same branch/PR
  - Release: no cancel for same tag (safety for releases)
  - ACFS notify: cancel-in-progress for same ref
- Use frozen-lockfile for reproducible installs
- Consolidate duplicate ACFS notification workflows:
  - Remove acfs-checksums-dispatch.yml (superseded)
  - Enhance notify-acfs.yml with release trigger support
  - Add richer payload with repo, event, and timestamp fallback
  - Add token validation step with warning annotation

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,30 +0,0 @@
-name: Notify ACFS checksum monitor
-
-on:
-  push:
-    branches: [main, master]
-    paths:
-      - 'install.sh'
-      - 'scripts/install.sh'
-  release:
-    types: [published]
-  workflow_dispatch:
-
-jobs:
-  dispatch:
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    steps:
-      - name: Ensure dispatch token
-        if: ${{ secrets.ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN == '' }}
-        run: |
-          echo "Missing secret ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN. Add a PAT with repo access for Dicklesworthstone/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup." >&2
-          exit 1
-      - name: Dispatch to ACFS
-        if: ${{ secrets.ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN != '' }}
-        uses: peter-evans/repository-dispatch@v3
-        with:
-          token: ${{ secrets.ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN }}
-          repository: Dicklesworthstone/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup
-          event-type: upstream-changed
-          client-payload: |
-            {"repo":"${{ github.repository }}","ref":"${{ github.ref }}","sha":"${{ github.sha }}","event":"${{ github.event_name }}"}

@@ -6,9 +6,15 @@ on:
   pull_request:
     branches: [main]
 
+# Prevent duplicate workflow runs for the same branch/PR
+concurrency:
+  group: ci-${{ github.ref }}
+  cancel-in-progress: true
+
 jobs:
   test:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 15
 
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
@@ -18,8 +24,16 @@ jobs:
         with:
           bun-version: latest
 
+      - name: Cache Bun dependencies
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: ~/.bun/install/cache
+          key: bun-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('bun.lock') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            bun-${{ runner.os }}-
+
       - name: Install dependencies
-        run: bun install
+        run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
 
       - name: Type check
         run: bun run typecheck
@@ -57,6 +71,7 @@ jobs:
 
   coverage:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 15
     env:
       # Phase 1 thresholds (raise intentionally via PRs).
       COVERAGE_MIN_FUNCS: "70"
@@ -70,8 +85,16 @@ jobs:
         with:
           bun-version: latest
 
+      - name: Cache Bun dependencies
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: ~/.bun/install/cache
+          key: bun-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('bun.lock') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            bun-${{ runner.os }}-
+
       - name: Install dependencies
-        run: bun install
+        run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
 
       - name: Run tests with coverage (offline)
         run: bash scripts/coverage.sh
@@ -128,6 +151,7 @@ jobs:
 
   e2e-scripts:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 20
 
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
@@ -137,8 +161,16 @@ jobs:
         with:
           bun-version: latest
 
+      - name: Cache Bun dependencies
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: ~/.bun/install/cache
+          key: bun-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('bun.lock') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            bun-${{ runner.os }}-
+
       - name: Install dependencies
-        run: bun install
+        run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
 
       - name: Run e2e smoke script (offline)
         run: bash scripts/e2e-smoke.sh
@@ -163,6 +195,7 @@ jobs:
 
   build:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 10
 
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
@@ -172,8 +205,16 @@ jobs:
         with:
           bun-version: latest
 
+      - name: Cache Bun dependencies
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: ~/.bun/install/cache
+          key: bun-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('bun.lock') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            bun-${{ runner.os }}-
+
       - name: Install dependencies
-        run: bun install
+        run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
 
       - name: Build
         run: |

@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # .github/workflows/notify-acfs.yml
 #
-# Notifies ACFS when installer scripts change, triggering checksum updates.
-# Use this template for repos with install.sh at the repository root.
+# Notifies ACFS when installer scripts change or releases are published,
+# triggering checksum updates.
 #
 # Setup:
 #   1. Create a PAT with 'contents:read' on agentic_coding_flywheel_setup
@@ -17,12 +17,28 @@ on:
     branches: [main, master]
     paths:
       - 'install.sh'
+      - 'scripts/install.sh'
+  release:
+    types: [published]
   workflow_dispatch:  # Manual trigger for testing
 
+# Prevent duplicate dispatches
+concurrency:
+  group: notify-acfs-${{ github.ref }}
+  cancel-in-progress: true
+
 jobs:
   notify-acfs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 5
+
     steps:
+      - name: Validate dispatch token
+        if: ${{ secrets.ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN == '' }}
+        run: |
+          echo "::warning::Missing secret ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN. Add a PAT with repo access for Dicklesworthstone/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup."
+          exit 1
+
       - name: Trigger ACFS checksum update
         uses: peter-evans/repository-dispatch@v3
         with:
@@ -31,16 +47,20 @@ jobs:
           event-type: upstream-changed
           client-payload: |
             {
+              "repo": "${{ github.repository }}",
               "tool": "${{ github.event.repository.name }}",
               "ref": "${{ github.ref }}",
               "sha": "${{ github.sha }}",
+              "event": "${{ github.event_name }}",
               "actor": "${{ github.actor }}",
-              "timestamp": "${{ github.event.head_commit.timestamp }}"
+              "timestamp": "${{ github.event.head_commit.timestamp || github.event.release.published_at }}"
             }
 
       - name: Log dispatch
         run: |
-          echo "✅ Dispatched upstream-changed event to ACFS"
+          echo "Dispatched upstream-changed event to ACFS"
+          echo "   Repository: ${{ github.repository }}"
           echo "   Tool: ${{ github.event.repository.name }}"
           echo "   SHA: ${{ github.sha }}"
+          echo "   Event: ${{ github.event_name }}"
           echo "   Triggered by: ${{ github.actor }}"

@@ -11,12 +11,18 @@ on:
         required: true
         type: string
 
+# Prevent concurrent releases
+concurrency:
+  group: release-${{ github.ref }}
+  cancel-in-progress: false
+
 permissions:
   contents: write
 
 jobs:
   build:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 20
 
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
@@ -26,8 +32,16 @@ jobs:
         with:
           bun-version: latest
 
+      - name: Cache Bun dependencies
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: ~/.bun/install/cache
+          key: bun-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('bun.lock') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            bun-${{ runner.os }}-
+
       - name: Install dependencies
-        run: bun install
+        run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
 
       - name: Build all binaries (cross-compilation)
         run: |
@@ -66,6 +80,7 @@ jobs:
   release:
     needs: build
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 10
 
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
@@ -104,6 +119,7 @@ jobs:
   publish-installer:
     needs: release
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 5
 
     outputs:
       version: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
@@ -137,6 +153,7 @@ jobs:
   notify-homebrew-tap:
     name: Notify Homebrew Tap
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 5
     needs: publish-installer
     steps:
       - name: Trigger formula update
@@ -160,6 +177,7 @@ jobs:
   notify-scoop-bucket:
     name: Notify Scoop Bucket
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 5
     needs: publish-installer
     steps:
       - name: Trigger manifest update
